name: @prizmad/mcp-server
description: MCP server for Prizmad — AI-powered UGC video ad generation. 9 tools (recommend_template, list_my_videos, upload_image, create_video with full customisation, get_video_status with live progress, …). OAuth 2.1 Connect flow for remote use; stdio bridge for local API-key flows.
author: Prizmad <hello@prizmad.com> (https://prizmad.com)
